DROP TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_LEAD_FORM]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[DIM_FB_ADS_LEAD_FORM]
( 
	[LeadFormID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[AccountID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[LeadFormName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Status] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[IsOptimizedForQuality] [bit]  NULL,
	[CreatedTime] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[LeadsCount] [bigint]  NULL,
	[ExpiredLeadsCount] [bigint]  NULL,
	[OrganicLeadsCount] [bigint]  NULL,
	[FollowUpActionURL] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[PageID] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[PageName] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Locale] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ContextCardID] [nvarchar](16)  NULL,
	[ContextCardStyle] [nvarchar](16)  NULL,
	[ContextCardTitle] [nvarchar](64)  NULL,
	[ContextCardCoverPhotoID] [nvarchar](32)  NULL,
	[ContextCardCoverPhotoCreatedTime] [nvarchar](32)  NULL,
	[AllowOrganicLead] [bit]  NULL,
	[BlockDisplayForNonTargetedViewer] [bit]  NULL,
	[ContextCardButtonText] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[ContextCardContent] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[LegalContentID] [nvarchar](16)  NULL,
	[LegalContentPrivacyPolicyURL] [nvarchar](128)  NULL,
	[LegalContentPrivacyPolicyLinkText] [nvarchar](128)  NULL,
	[LegalContentCustomDisclaimerBodyText] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[LegalContentCustomDisclaimerBodyURLEntities] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[PrivacyPolicyURL] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[QuestionPageCustomHeadline] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[Questions] [nvarchar](4000)  NULL,
	[ThankYouPageBody] [nvarchar](256)  NULL,
	[ThankYouPageButtonText] [nvarchar](32)  NULL,
	[ThankYouPageButtonType] [nvarchar](16)  NULL,
	[ThankYouPageEnableMessenger] [bit]  NULL,
	[ThankYouPageID] [nvarchar](16)  NULL,
	[ThankYouPageTitle] [nvarchar](64)  NULL,
	[ThankYouPageWebsiteURL] [nvarchar](128)  NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = REPLICATE,
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
